name: Half Moons
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Sour milk (add 1 tablespoon vinegar to milk, let stand 15 minutes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the butter or margarine and sugar together until well combined.
2. Beat in the eggs one at a time.
3. Alternately add the sour milk (mixed with vinegar) and flour mixture to the butter mixture.
4. Stir in the vanilla extract.
5. Drop 6-8 tablespoonfuls of batter onto a lightly greased cookie sheet, spacing them widely apart.
6. Bake at 350°F for about 10 minutes, or until browned around the edges.
7. Makes approximately 24 cookies (large).
8. Frost half with chocolate frosting and half with vanilla frosting.
